top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 26 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Taiwan's second-largest chipmaker starts mass production in Singapore; Citi sees improving outlook
top_signals.summary: Taiwan’s UMC has kicked off mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility amid positive Citi forecast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Legal Sub Committee Meeting – 17 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England provides the Secretariat to the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Legal Sub-Committee. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oil Climbs, US Futures Dip on Fresh Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Climbs, US Futures Dip on Fresh Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Industry partners form North American Critical Manganese Alliance
top_signals.summary: Aim is develop two complementary industrial platforms; Canadian and US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: First human trial of Bundibugyo Ebola vaccine begins
top_signals.summary: The early-stage trial will enroll 50 healthy adults to assess the vaccine's safety and immune response.
